'''Dustini Spa Ronii''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologist]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. He appealed to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] for help for his subjugated world. His cousin was [[Dustangle]].

{{Char-stub}}
